subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto the call of Husayn. Thy letter hath been considered by the glance of loving-kindness. Render thou praise unto the Beloved of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غلام ندای حسین را بشنو نامه ات بطرف عنایت ملاحظه شد حمد کن محبوب عالمیان را
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @naming of children; of individuals, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @thankfulness; gratitude
